nasb.text: Therefore many of His disciples, when they heard this said, “This is a difficult statement; who can listen to it?”

esv.text: When many of his disciples heard it, they said, “This is a hard saying; who can listen to it?”

cnv.text: 他的門徒中，有許多人聽了，就說：“這話很難，誰能接受呢？”

ccb.text: 祂的许多门徒听了，就议论说：“这话实在难懂，谁能接受呢？”

csbs.text: 他的门徒当中有许多人听了，就说：“这话实在严厉，谁能听呢？”
